acceptance_targets: [chapter_02_booker_001] In the revised chapter, at least one of the intelligence beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:145-149, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:183-191, or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:257-258 includes immediate interpersonal resistance or suspicion on the page, and Elise must actively adapt to preserve cover before she secures the information or access.

[chapter_02_craft_001] Each cited span can be read as complete narration without the reader supplying missing words or verbs, and no fragmentary negative-beat sentences remain in narration at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:147, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:155, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:159, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:189, or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:269.

[chapter_02_prose_001] After revision, no more than two `as if` comparison clauses remain in the chapter, and in the cited passages the image or judgment is carried by direct description or assertion rather than `as if` scaffolding.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised chapter, at least one of the intelligence beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:145-149, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:183-191, or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:257-258 includes immediate interpersonal resistance or suspicion on the page, and Elise must actively adapt to preserve cover before she secures the information or access.
findings.problem: Elise achieves nearly every chapter objective through an orderly sequence of chores and convenient reveals: Clemence routes her to the schoolroom, the print chamber opens itself in Nadir's wake, the map is briefly exposed beside her, and Lucien then invites her into the print room the next day. Because the refuge gives up its key assets so cleanly, the chapter reads partly as a guided tour of reasons to care rather than a scene where surveillance risks exposure.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:59-63, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:145-149, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:183-191, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:257-258, add counterpressure so at least one key observation costs Elise something in scene. Options: have Clemence or Nadir clock her attention and redirect her; keep the map physically present but partially withheld; or make Lucien's offer contingent on a small test that forces Elise to choose between better intelligence and better cover.

findings.acceptance_test: Each cited span can be read as complete narration without the reader supplying missing words or verbs, and no fragmentary negative-beat sentences remain in narration at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:147, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:155, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:159, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:189, or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:269.
findings.problem: The narration repeatedly falls into clipped fragment beats such as "Not a bomb workshop. Not today." and "Not holy. Not abstract." This is not just a style preference issue: the constitution explicitly forbids elliptical clipping in narration. Repeating the move also makes the chapter's emphasis feel mannered instead of inevitable.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the fragmentary narration at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:147, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:155, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:159, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:189, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:269 as grammatically complete sentences with subjects and verbs while preserving compression and pressure. Keep the insight, but remove the subject-dropping and free-standing negative beats.

findings.acceptance_test: After revision, no more than two `as if` comparison clauses remain in the chapter, and in the cited passages the image or judgment is carried by direct description or assertion rather than `as if` scaffolding.
findings.problem: The chapter leans too often on the same `as if` comparison scaffold. Used this many times, the construction becomes a visible prose tic: it mediates perception through explanatory simile instead of letting the quarry, the bodies, and Elise's judgments land directly.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:65, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:133, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:159, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:235, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_02.md:271, replace most of the `as if` clauses with direct sensory description or direct inference in Elise's voice. Keep at most one or two strategically chosen comparisons where the indirection adds real pressure rather than default texture.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the contradiction that tenderness can coexist with surveillance, desire with betrayal, and ideology with vanity. Render violence, sex, illness, and poverty at the scale characters actually experience them. When an edge case appears, choose the more specific and less reputationally safe version if it remains faithful to character, period, and causality.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches bodily danger, sex, grief, class shame, or political cruelty and then retreats into summary, rewrite toward the exact physical and social fact the character cannot evade.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: Moderate to high; contractions are the spoken default, with full forms reserved for period formality, deliberate emphasis, or Vautrin's cultivated precision.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressive surveillance chapters with slower communal or reflective chapters; vary scene count, dialogue density, and whether the turn comes from action, information, dread, or aftermath so no two adjacent chapters run on the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Historically grounded and unsentimental; plain enough for labor and bureaucracy, lyrical only when perception earns it rather than rhetoric.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third centered on Elise, elastic enough to register class texture, political pressure, and the quarry's collective life without drifting into authorial essay.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, image-bearing sentences broken by hard factual beats at moments of violence, lust, bureaucratic coercion, or shame.
